name: SAPPER

abilities.name: Evasive
abilities.text: This model may ignore (x) effects which did not target it.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

actions.name: Trench Gun
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(gun)6".

triggers.name: Bayonet
triggers.text: When resolving, deal +1 damage if this action was generated by a Charge action.

actions.name: Disrupt Supply Lines
actions.effects: Target must discard a random card.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Trench Jump
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an ally or Assault marker within range.
actions.effects: Place this model into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Foxhole
triggers.text: This model gains a Hidden token.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 from 'Minion (3)' text below artwork
